title: Job Description — Output Structure
description: v2 (2026-07-18). Structural contract for the rendered JD, aligned to Susan's production structure (prompts/01-job-description.md). The delivered artifact is Markdown in-chat; this schema describes the sections it must be derivable from, for validation and future non-Markdown rendering. 500-700 words total.

scopeAndWhyOpen.description: The Scope of the Role and Why It's Open — public-safe only.

successPlan306090.description: 30/60/90-day success plan using the ATR framework.

whatWeveAchieved.description: What We've Achieved and What We'll Do With You.

aLittleBitAboutYou.description: One paragraph, max 100 words: evidence-based predictors of success — behaviours, competencies, measurable achievements, contextual fit.

language.description: Language the JD is written in (default 'en').
